jd_text:
Job Title: AI Product Engineer — CEO's Office
Company: Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd. (nicobar.com)
Location: Delhi
Experience: 3-5 years

THE OPPORTUNITY
We've spent a decade building a brand that looks and feels unmistakably Nicobar. The next chapter is building a company that thinks the same way — every store, every collection, every customer conversation: sharper, faster, unmistakably ours. AI-native, not in theory, but in every room we walk into.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
01 Customer Personalization : Build the intelligence layer beneath all our customer communication that understands who each customer actually is.
02 Store Clienteling : Build the clienteling tool our store teams reach for every day.
03 Business Intelligence : Replace Microsoft BI dashboards with a live, conversational intelligence layer.
04 Smoothen Design Workstreams : Remove friction so the creative team can make more, better, faster.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent with 3-5 years of experience.
You've built something real with an LLM API - OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.
Fluent in Python/ NodeJS. Comfortable writing and querying SQL.
Ability to build front-ends that don't embarrass the brand. We're visual people.
master_cv:
# Non-Technical Profile: Mark Thompson

## About Me
Marketing Director with 8 years of experience in brand strategy and digital growth.

## Professional Experience

### Marketing Director — BrandGrowth (2020 - Present)
- Increased organic traffic by 200% in 18 months.
- Managed a $5M annual advertising budget.

### Growth Manager — StartupX (2016 - 2020)
- Scaled user base from 10k to 500k.

## Skills
- Brand Strategy, Content Marketing, SEO
- Team Leadership, Budget Management

## Education
B.A. Communications — New York University

## Search Preferences (PRIVATE)
- Prefer Series B startups
- Constraint: Must be fully remote

- Managed a $5M annual advertising budget.

- Brand Strategy, Content Marketing, SEO

- Prefer Series B startups

company_intelligence.brand_positioning: Contemporary Indian lifestyle brand with a focus on design, quality, and sustainability
company_intelligence.recent_initiatives: Expanding offline presence, focusing on AI-driven personalization and operations
company_intelligence.tech_stack: UNKNOWN (but JD mentions Microsoft BI, LLM APIs, Python/NodeJS, SQL)

must_haves: Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
Built something real with an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
Ability to build front-ends that are visually appealing
nice_to_haves: Experience with retail or e-commerce domain
Experience with business intelligence and conversational interfaces
hidden_expectations: Must be comfortable working directly with the CEO's office and senior leadership
Should have a strong design sensibility and appreciation for brand aesthetics
Ability to work in a fast-paced, startup-like environment within an established brand
Proactive and able to own projects end-to-end with minimal supervision
Strong communication skills to bridge technical and creative teams
day_one_deliverables: Assess current tech stack and data infrastructure
Identify quick wins for AI integration in customer communication
Propose a roadmap for replacing Microsoft BI with conversational intelligence
Start prototyping a clienteling tool for store teams
disqualifiers: Not fluent in Python or NodeJS
No engineering degree from a top-tier institution

disqualifiers_triggered: Not fluent in Python or NodeJS
No engineering degree from a top-tier institution
user_truth.notes: Candidate is a Marketing Director with 10 years of experience (exceeds 3-5 years). No engineering degree, no technical skills (Python, NodeJS, SQL, LLM APIs, front-end). No evidence of relevant experience. Disqualified.
